meta.title: Privacy Policy - CyberVPN
meta.description: Privacy notice для Public Release 1.0: категории данных, retention criteria, limits no-logs claims, providers и privacy contacts.

dataCollection.title: Data We Process
dataCollection.intro: CyberVPN обрабатывает данные, необходимые для публичного B2C-сервиса, аутентификации пользователей, выдачи VPN-доступа, обработки платежей, предотвращения abuse и поддержки:

items.accountInfo: Account and authentication data: email, username/display name, password hash, 2FA/TOTP state, Telegram ID/username where linked, OAuth provider identifiers and profile email where used.
items.paymentInfo: Commercial and payment data: plan, trial, subscription, wallet state, provider name, provider transaction identifiers, payment status, refund/dispute metadata and reconciliation records.
items.deviceInfo: Device, access and provisioning data: session identifiers, refresh-token metadata, device ID where provided, IP address and user-agent in auth/security logs, Remnawave user reference, subscription URL state and device credential state.
items.usageStats: Operational data: support tickets/staff notes, notification delivery state, audit logs, webhook payload snapshots, security/rate-limit events, backup presence and aggregated service health/traffic counters where enabled.

noLogPolicy.title: VPN activity и limits no-logs claims
noLogPolicy.statement: CyberVPN app/backend не спроектирован для хранения browsing content, visited website content, DNS query content или raw VPN traffic content.
noLogPolicy.details: Это не независимая audited no-logs certification. Security, payment, support, provisioning, node и observability records могут содержать operational data: account identifiers, IP address, user-agent, provider IDs, timestamps, aggregated counters или error metadata, если это нужно для работы, безопасности, поддержки и reconciliation сервиса.

notLogged.browsing: Browsing content and visited website content are not intended to be stored by the CyberVPN app/backend.
notLogged.connections: Connection/session metadata depends on Remnawave, VPN node and observability configuration and is kept within the operational limits described in this policy.
notLogged.traffic: Raw VPN traffic content is not intended to be inspected by CyberVPN support/admin tooling.
notLogged.dns: DNS query logging is not advertised as an audited no-logs guarantee; actual handling depends on the active node, resolver and client configuration.

dataRetention.title: Retention Criteria
dataRetention.description: Retention periods depend on account status, security needs, provider obligations, abuse handling, support requirements and backup windows:

policies.accountData: Account, authentication and subscription data: retained while the account is active and for the period needed to handle security, abuse, accounting, support, deletion and backup windows.
policies.paymentRecords: Payment, refund, dispute and reconciliation records: retained for provider, finance, tax, fraud-prevention and legal obligations; the practical period depends on the enabled provider rules and applicable obligations.
policies.supportLogs: Support tickets, staff notes and notification records: target retention is 90 days after closure unless needed for fraud, abuse, paid-no-access, legal, safety or accounting reasons.
policies.deletedAccounts: Validated deletion requests: operational account deletion target is 30 days, except records that must be retained for payment, security, legal, fraud, backup or abuse handling. Production PostgreSQL backup retention follows the approved backup policy.

gdprRights.title: Privacy Rights
gdprRights.intro: Depending on your location and applicable law, you may have rights to request access, correction, deletion, portability, objection or restriction. Some requests may require manual support/privacy processing.

access.title: Access
access.description: Request a copy or summary of personal data associated with your account.

rectification.title: Correction
rectification.description: Request correction of inaccurate account, Telegram/OAuth or support data.

erasure.title: Deletion
erasure.description: Request account deletion subject to payment, security, legal, fraud, backup and abuse-retention limits.

portability.title: Portability
portability.description: Request a portable account-data export where technically available or a manual support export.

objection.title: Objection or Restriction
objection.description: Object to or request restriction of optional processing where applicable. Service-critical processing may be required to provide VPN access.

dataSecurity.title: Security Controls
dataSecurity.description: CyberVPN uses operational security controls for the public B2C service and limits public claims to what the deployed system can support:

measures.encryption: Passwords and refresh tokens are stored as hashes; selected OAuth/TOTP/provider tokens are encrypted or handled through the approved secret process where implemented.
measures.accessControl: Admin access is role-gated, requires 2FA in production mode and writes audit events for privileged operations.
measures.secureProtocols: Production topology uses private PostgreSQL, private Valkey/Redis, private Remnawave API and HTTPS-only public ingress where required.
measures.regularAudits: Release readiness uses evidence for secret scanning, dependency checks, backup/restore, rollback, observability, webhook idempotency, support escalation and admin access control. No independent public security audit is claimed unless CyberVPN publishes one explicitly.

thirdParty.title: Processors and Providers
thirdParty.description: CyberVPN may use the following provider categories where enabled and configured with the required operational controls:

services.payment: Payment providers: PayRam, NOWPayments, CryptoBot, Telegram Stars for Telegram, Digiseller and YooKassa where approved for the relevant user segment.
services.analytics: Operational analytics/observability such as Sentry, PostHog or metrics/logging tools only where enabled and configured with PII controls.
services.infrastructure: Infrastructure and service providers: managed PostgreSQL, private Valkey/Redis, Remnawave, VPN node hosts, Telegram, Google/GitHub OAuth and email/support tooling.

contact.title: Privacy Contact
contact.intro: For privacy questions, deletion/export requests or privacy-related complaints, contact us through the approved privacy route:
contact.addressLine: Владелец проекта CyberVPN, individual founder/owner. Общая поддержка: support@cyber-vpn.net. Abuse reports: abuse@cyber-vpn.net. Refund requests: refund@cyber-vpn.net.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.description: CyberVPN может обновлять эту policy при изменении providers, product flows, retention rules, support processes или legal requirements. Существенные публичные изменения должны быть согласованы с Terms of Service, Acceptable Use Policy, Refund Policy и Cookie Policy.
